description: tuppr — Talos & Kubernetes upgrade operator. Tracks upgrade phases, node progress, durations, health checks, hooks, and maintenance windows.

panels.description: Operator build info: version label tracks tuppr_build_info.
panels.title: Operator version

panels.description: Cluster nodes the operator can see, by role.
panels.title: Managed nodes

panels.description: Health check failures over the last hour.
panels.title: Health check failures (1h)

panels.description: Failed hook executions in the last hour.
panels.title: Hook failures (1h)

panels.description: Successful completion ratio across all upgrades over the last 7d. Empty if no upgrade has ever completed.
panels.title: Upgrade success rate (7d)

panels.description: Time since the most recent successful upgrade across all types.
panels.title: Since last success

panels.description: Most recent completion per upgrade.
panels.title: Recent upgrade completions

panels.description: Per-node version inventory, sourced from tuppr_node_info. Talos version is parsed from Node.status.nodeInfo.osImage.
panels.title: Node version inventory

panels.description: Current phase of each Talos upgrade. One row per upgrade; cell value is the active phase.
panels.title: Talos upgrade status

panels.description: Phase progression over time per Talos upgrade. State-set: only one phase is 1 at a time. Filtered to the currently active phase so each upgrade shows one bar at a time.
panels.title: Talos upgrade phase

panels.description: p50/p95/p99 phase duration for Talos upgrades.
panels.title: Talos phase duration (quantiles)

panels.description: Current phase of the (singleton) Kubernetes upgrade.
panels.title: Kubernetes upgrade status

panels.description: Phase progression over time for the Kubernetes upgrade. Filtered to the currently active phase so each upgrade shows one bar at a time.
panels.title: Kubernetes upgrade phase

panels.description: p50/p95/p99 phase duration for Kubernetes upgrades.
panels.title: Kubernetes phase duration (quantiles)

panels.description: Failure rate of health checks (per minute), by upgrade type.
panels.title: Health check failure rate

panels.description: p50/p95 health check duration.
panels.title: Health check duration

panels.description: Top failing health checks by index (last 1h).
panels.title: Health check failures by check (1h)

panels.description: Number of in-flight upgrade jobs by type.
panels.title: Active upgrade jobs over time

panels.description: p95 job duration by type and result.
panels.title: Upgrade job duration p95

panels.description: Per-node job durations and outcomes for recent runs.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (upgrade_type, upgrade_name, node_name, result, le) (rate(tuppr_upgrade_job_duration_seconds_bucket[$__range])))

panels.title: Per-node job durations (range p95)

panels.description: Hook executions per minute, broken down by phase and result.
panels.title: Hook executions / min

panels.description: Hook executions broken down per upgrade and hook name.
panels.title: Hook activity (range)

panels.description: When each upgrade's next maintenance window opens (when currently outside).
panels.title: Maintenance window status

panels.description: Count of upgrades parked on external state, grouped by reason.
panels.title: Blocked upgrades by reason

panels.description: Per-upgrade view of why progress is paused.
panels.title: Blocked upgrades

title: tuppr — Talos & Kubernetes upgrades
